title: calliandra pallida
intro: Calliandra pallida is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, commonly known as the "Mexican Powder Puff" due to its fluffy, pink or red pom-pom-like flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calliandra pallida include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
